text: CrisisMap helps humanitarian teams capture, store, and export damage assessments for crisis response.
Admins authenticate securely to manage crises and protect sensitive assessment data.
Create an active crisis with location and form templates so field teams know what to document.
Field users capture structured damage information — severity, building type, location, and photos — without an account.
Validated reports appear on the live crisis map for real-time situational awareness.
Repeat assessments at the same building are versioned, tracking how damage changes over time.
UNDP and humanitarian partners export structured data as CSV, GeoJSON, or Shapefile for coordination and analysis.
Without connectivity, reports save privately on the device and sync automatically once back online.
